app.name: courtos-web
app.purpose: Marketing site + legal pages + live match broadcast viewer + SEO blog for the CourtOS volleyball app.
app.sibling_repo: volleyiq-coach (the React Native app). See cross_repo.

edge_types.cross_repo: relationship to a node in the volleyiq-coach knowledge graph

cross_repo._comment: courtos-web shares a Supabase project and product with volleyiq-coach. These are the bridges. The app-side graph is at ../../volleyiq-coach/knowledge/graph/index.json (sibling folder).
cross_repo.shared_supabase_project: Same Supabase project as the app (same project ref). Web uses NEXT_PUBLIC anon key + RLS.

bridges.note: App broadcasts (owner INSERT/UPDATE); web reads by room_code via realtime (public SELECT).
App writes room_code/score/rotation/stats_snapshot; web subscribes to UPDATE.
App reset triggers web email with recovery queries (30-day soft-delete window).
Web hosts the legal text the app links to; resolves part of app blocker R4 (entity now 'CourtOS LLC, California').
Same tiers: Free / Coach Premium $9.99 / Coach Advanced $19.99.
Web-only acquisition table; funnels into app beta (TestFlight/Android).

nodes.name: Landing page
nodes.purpose: The marketing home page. Composes 11 sections from Navbar through Footer.
business_rules: Positioning: 'Your Entire Coaching Staff. One Tap.'
Primary CTA everywhere = Join Beta (#beta).

nodes.name: Root layout + metadata
nodes.purpose: Global HTML shell: fonts (Inter body, Bebas Neue headlines), metadata, OpenGraph/Twitter, icons, theme color #0C0C0C.
business_rules: metadataBase https://courtos.co
Title: 'CourtOS — Your Entire Coaching Staff. One Tap.'
og-image /og-image.png 1200x630.

nodes.name: Navbar
nodes.purpose: Sticky scroll-reactive nav. Links: Features, How It Works, Academy(/blog), Beta. CTA Join Beta.

nodes.name: Hero
nodes.purpose: Headline 'YOUR ENTIRE COACHING STAFF. IN ONE TAP.' + phone carousel + Get Early Access CTA.

nodes.name: HeroPhone
nodes.purpose: Animated phone frame cycling app-rally/heatmap/stats webp screens (3200ms).

nodes.name: PhoneMockup
nodes.purpose: Interactive faux app UI (Match/Lineup/Stats/History tabs, court grid, point buttons).

nodes.name: NoAssistantNeeded
nodes.purpose: 4 cards: Scorekeeper / Rotation Tracker / Sub Coordinator / Stats Person — what CourtOS replaces.

nodes.name: Agitation
nodes.purpose: 4 coach-pain testimonial cards ('COACHING ALONE IS HARD. WE KNOW.').

nodes.name: AppTease
nodes.purpose: 3 blurred 'BETA ACCESS ONLY' feature preview cards.

nodes.name: FeatureShowcase
nodes.purpose: Interactive auto-cycling carousel (5 screens) anchored at #in-action.

nodes.name: FeaturesSection
nodes.purpose: 6-card feature grid (auto-rotation, smart subs, live stats, libero enforcement, history, live broadcast). Anchor #features.

nodes.name: HowItWorks
nodes.purpose: 3-step timeline (Create Roster 2min / Build Lineup 30sec / Just Coach). Anchor #how-it-works.

nodes.name: FinalCTA
nodes.purpose: Closing conversion section repeating the headline + Get Early Access.

nodes.name: Footer
nodes.purpose: Logo + Features/How It Works/Beta links + copyright.

nodes.name: SocialProof (unused)
nodes.purpose: Credibility cards + coach quote. NOT rendered on home page (available for future use).

nodes.name: Beta Signup
nodes.purpose: Beta waitlist form. Writes to Supabase beta_signups + calls notify-signup email route.
business_rules: Fields: name*, email*, role* (head_coach/new_coach/parent_volunteer/athletic_director/player/just_interested), organization?, message?.
Inserts to beta_signups with source 'courtos.co/beta'.
Then POSTs /api/notify-signup. Success state offers Web Share.
Disclaimer: Free during beta · No credit card · No spam.

nodes.name: Live Broadcast Viewer
nodes.purpose: Parents watch a live match by room code. Reads live_matches and subscribes to realtime UPDATEs.
business_rules: Join via ?code= query param (sanitized, 6+ alphanumerics, displayed XXX-XXX).
Query: live_matches where room_code=clean AND is_active=true (.single()).
Realtime: supabase.channel postgres_changes UPDATE on live_matches filtered room_code.
States: enter / loading / watching / ended / error. No auth (room code = capability).
Displays: team/opponent names, score, set, sets won/lost, serving_us, current_rotation, court_mode, team + per-player stats_snapshot.

nodes.name: Privacy Policy
nodes.purpose: Privacy policy. Effective 2026-06-14. COPPA, AI/Anthropic (no model training), retention, rights.
business_rules: Not directed to under-13; minor roster data = service-provider processing, no selling/ads.
Contact support@courtos.co.
No placeholders remaining.

nodes.name: Terms of Service
nodes.purpose: ToS. Effective 2026-06-14. Eligibility 13+, roster-data responsibility, AI accuracy disclaimer, liability cap (greater of 12-mo paid or US$50), governing law California.
business_rules: Entity: CourtOS LLC, a California LLC.
No placeholders remaining (resolves part of app blocker R4).

nodes.name: Subscription Terms
nodes.purpose: Pricing + auto-renew + cancel/restore/refund. Free / Coach Premium $9.99 / Coach Advanced $19.99.
business_rules: Auto-renew unless canceled >=24h before period end.
Payments via app stores + RevenueCat; CourtOS stores no card data.
Refunds per app-store policy.

nodes.name: LegalShell
nodes.purpose: Shared legal-page layout (sticky header, 820px prose, footer with support email + cross-links). Brand bg #060b14.

nodes.name: Blog / Academy index
nodes.purpose: CourtOS Academy — volleyball coaching guides. Lists posts (newest first).

nodes.name: Blog post page
nodes.purpose: Static-generated article. Renders post.html via dangerouslySetInnerHTML; emits Article + Breadcrumb + FAQPage JSON-LD.
business_rules: Posts are static HTML strings in posts.ts (no MDX).
Weekly SEO task appends a BlogPost.
Per-post canonical + OG article + Twitter card.

nodes.name: posts.ts registry
nodes.purpose: Static BlogPost[] + getPost/getAllPosts. Current: 'how-to-track-a-6-2-rotation' (2026-06-17, 7min, 3 FAQs).

nodes.name: POST /api/notify-signup
nodes.purpose: Emails the team about a new beta signup; optionally emails the user a TestFlight/Android install link.
business_rules: Sends via Resend from hello@courtos.co; team copy to courtos@courtos.co.
User welcome email only if TESTFLIGHT_LINK env set (+ ANDROID_TEST_LINK optional).
Env: RESEND_API_KEY, TESTFLIGHT_LINK?, ANDROID_TEST_LINK?.

nodes.name: POST /api/notify-reset
nodes.purpose: When a user resets/deletes data in the app, emails admin recovery SQL (teams/lineups/players/data_backups) for the 30-day window.
business_rules: Inputs: userId, userEmail, resetAt, kind (match_history|full reset).
Sends to bentesoro1@gmail.com via Resend.
Env: RESEND_API_KEY.

nodes.name: lib/supabase.ts
nodes.purpose: Browser Supabase client (anon key) with realtime 10 events/sec. Relies on RLS (public SELECT on live_matches).
business_rules: Env: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.
Anon only — no service role on the client.

nodes.name: live_matches (shared table)
nodes.purpose: Realtime broadcast row written by the app, read by the web /live viewer. Public SELECT, owner-scoped writes.
business_rules: Fields: room_code, is_active, team_name, opponent_name, our_score, their_score, current_set, sets_won, sets_lost, serving_us, current_rotation, court_mode, stats_snapshot(jsonb), last_updated.

nodes.name: beta_signups (web-only table)
nodes.purpose: Marketing waitlist captured by the web form.
business_rules: Fields: name, email, organization, coaching_level, frustration, source.
Not present in the app graph (web-only).

nodes.name: Resend (email service)
nodes.purpose: Transactional email (signup notifications, install links, reset-recovery emails).
business_rules: From hello@courtos.co. Env RESEND_API_KEY.

nodes.name: sitemap.ts / robots.ts
nodes.purpose: Dynamic sitemap (home, blog, legal, per-post) + permissive robots + sitemap host.

nodes.name: icon.tsx / manifest
nodes.purpose: Dynamic favicon (ImageResponse, blue square 'C') + site.webmanifest + icon set.
